model_essays.title: 黄山
model_essays.genre: descriptive expository essay (说明文/描写文)
model_essays.text:
黄山，是中国著名的风景旅游胜地，也是世界闻名的游览胜地。黄山位于安徽省南部，总面积1200平方公里，主要景区面积154平方公里，有"五百里黄山"之称。黄山的自然景色集中了中国国内众多名山风光之美。黄山以其"四绝"——奇松、怪石、云海、温泉，深深吸引着到黄山游览的中外客人。

黄山的山很美，著名的山峰有72座，海拔在1500米以上的山峰有30多座，莲花峰、天都峰、光明顶是三大主峰。其中莲花峰最高，海拔1864米，是华东地区的最高点。当太阳刚刚升起的时候，从远处望去，它就像一朵初放的莲花。天都峰海拔1830米，是三大主峰中最险的一个，登山石阶约有3公里长，坡度在70度以上，最险处接近90度。光明顶海拔1840米，这里是看日出、观云海的好地方。黄山气象站就建在这里，它是华东地区最高的气象站。黄山山峰中有很多奇怪的石头，它们都是天然形成的，可是却像真的一样，如"猴子观海"、"狮子峰"、"飞来石"等。

黄山松是黄山的一大"特产"。它生长在海拔800米以上的山上。黄山松千姿百态，美丽奇特，这和黄山的自然环境有很大的关系。黄山松的种子被风吹进石头缝中，在那里发芽、生根、成长。由于山上地势不平，悬崖峭壁纵横交错，黄山松无法垂直生长，只能弯弯曲曲地甚至向下生长，显示出顽强的生命力。著名的迎客松为黄山十大名松之首。

黄山云海极为壮观。云海多发生在春秋两季雨后初晴和冬季雪后的日子里。从方位分布上看，全山有东海、南海、西海、北海和天海。云涌之时，银浪滔滔，轻烟缭绕，人们到了这里就好像到了仙境一样。

黄山温泉是大自然创造的，它终年喷涌，可以饮用，也可以洗浴，水温常年在42°C，属高山温泉。

黄山之美并不止这"四绝"。黄山著名的水景还有三湖、三瀑、十六泉等。

黄山不仅风光奇秀，而且还出产名贵动植物。已知的高等植物有1600多种，其中有70多种是珍稀品种，中外闻名的茶叶——黄山毛峰就产在这里。在黄山，野生动物中仅脊椎动物就有300多种，其中鸟类有170多种，兽类有48种，爬行类有38种，鱼类有24种，两栖类有20种。

黄山位于亚热带北边，四季分明。"四绝"与四季气候组成了美丽的天然画卷。

"五岳归来不看山，黄山归来不看岳。"这两句流传很广的话是对黄山的最高赞誉。有人称黄山为"天下第一奇山"。联合国教科文组织的官员在考察黄山后说："黄山是最绝妙的。"1990年12月，黄山被联合国教科文组织列入《世界文化与自然遗产名录》，这是中国第一个同时作为文化和自然双重遗产列入名录的。

目前，黄山可供游览的景点有400多处，分为六个景区。其中主要的景点有温泉、人字瀑、天都峰、迎客松、莲花峰、光明顶、飞来石、排云亭、狮子峰、始信峰等。

黄山之美，无法用语言来描述，能让人产生太多的联想。
model_essays.summary: Comprehensive introduction to Mount Huangshan: its location, scale, the four wonders (奇松/怪石/云海/温泉), notable peaks, flora and fauna, UNESCO World Heritage status, and enduring cultural fame.
model_essays.why_study: A canonical model of Chinese landscape description. Shows the standard structure: overview → specific features in sequence → broader significance → closing appraisal. Rich in scenic-Chinese idioms and the classical couplet citation technique. The pivot from concrete statistics (1864m, 70°, 300+ species) to impressionistic language (仙境, 银浪滔滔) is a hallmark of formal Chinese nature writing.
key_devices: Four-part parallel structure: each of the 四绝 gets its own paragraph
Classical couplet citation as supreme endorsement: "五岳归来不看山，黄山归来不看岳"
Authoritative external validation: UNESCO quote and listing used as culminating proof
Embedded simile: "就像一朵初放的莲花"
Statistical specificity grounds the description: altitudes, percentages, species counts
Closing restraint: "无法用语言来描述" — the unspeakable sublime as final device

model_essays.title: 中国传统艺术之花——京剧
model_essays.text:
中国戏曲种类很多，京剧是其中的典型代表。京剧是一种综合的表演艺术，它已经形成了自己独特的表演体系。

清朝中期，在当时的京城里流行一种"皮黄戏"。由于受到北京语音和腔调的影响，皮黄戏就有了"京音"的特色。那时，演员们经常到上海演出，上海人就把这种带有北京特点的皮黄戏叫做"京戏"。戏也是剧，因此京戏也叫"京剧"。由于京剧在全中国流行，其艺术水平在中国戏曲中名列前茅，所以京剧也被称为"国剧"。

京剧表演的艺术形式主要是"唱"、"念"、"做"、"打"四种。

京剧的唱腔以"西皮"和"二黄"为主。不论"西皮"还是"二黄"，都有不同的节奏。由于京剧用板和鼓来打节拍，所以人们把京剧的节拍叫做"板"或"板眼"。京剧表演时，有乐队伴奏。乐队有"文场"、"武场"之分。文场指管弦乐，主要乐器有二胡、京胡、月琴、笛子、唢呐等。武场指打击乐，主要乐器是板、鼓、大锣、小锣等。伴奏时，这些乐器可以用来生动地模仿表现某些声音效果，如风声、雷声、马嘶、鸟叫等。京剧有"清唱"和"彩唱"，只唱不化妆不带动作的表演叫"清唱"，加上化妆和动作的表演叫"彩唱"。

京剧的"念"是带有音乐性的说话，也叫"道白"。主要有两种，一种叫"韵白"，一种叫"京白"，用来表现不同的人物角色。

京剧表演中的"做"指各种舞蹈性很强的表演动作、姿势和面部表情，都有相当严格的规定和模式。比如，表演走路时要有一定的步态，旦角走路脚跟先着地；官员走路时要抬腿，迈"四方步"。

"打"也是一种京剧表演形式，指的是舞蹈性很强的打斗。打斗分两类，一类不使用兵器，只用拳打脚踢；另一类则使用刀、枪、剑、戟等兵器，一般速度很快。

"唱"、"念"、"做"、"打"是京剧表演的四种基本形式，也是演员的四种表演功夫，称为"四功"。

京剧中有"生"、"旦"、"净"、"丑"四种行当。"生"指男性角色，分老生、小生和武生。老生扮演的是中年人和老年人；小生指青年人；武生指会武功的人物。"旦"指女性角色，按年龄分为"老旦"和"小旦"，按性格可分为"青衣"和"花旦"，按武功可分为"武旦"和"刀马旦"。老旦一般指老年妇女；花旦代表性格活泼、天真或泼辣的青少年女子；庄重的中年女性角色多穿黑色衣服，所以叫"青衣"；"武旦"指会武功的女性角色；而"刀马旦"则指身穿铠甲，英勇善战的女性。

"净"也叫"花脸"，它是在脸上涂上各种颜色，用来表现不同人物性格和特征的男性角色。对于不同的人物角色有各种不同规定的脸部图案，叫做"脸谱"。

"丑"指相貌难看的人物，在鼻子处涂上一块白色，所以也叫"小花脸"。"丑"分"文丑"、"武丑"和一般的"小丑"。武丑是会武功的丑角；文丑是不会武功的丑角。

京剧的戏装叫"行头"。不管是哪个朝代的人物，基本上都是明朝的打扮，并且不受剧情中季节和地区的限制。不分热天或冷天，南方或北方，汉族或其他民族，戏装主要随角色的身份、职业和性别而定。"水袖"是戏衣的袖口处缝的一块白绸子，因为甩动起来像水的波纹，所以叫水袖，具有很强的表情功能，紧张、悲伤、高兴、讨厌等都可以用多种形式舞动水袖来表示。

戏装中的鞋，男性角色多穿"靴子"，底很厚；女性穿"彩鞋"，平底，鞋面绣花。

京剧剧目非常丰富，已经知道的有5000多个剧本。其中许多规模很大，其内容多为历史故事，如"三国戏"、"水浒戏"、"红楼戏"、"西游戏"等。
model_essays.summary: Systematic introduction to Peking Opera: historical origin of the name, the four performance modes (唱念做打), the four role types (生旦净丑) with all sub-types, costumes and their logic, and the scale of the repertoire.
model_essays.why_study: An excellent model of classification-based exposition. Every category is introduced with a definition, then subdivided logically. The parallel sentence structures for listing sub-types (按年龄分…按性格分…按武功分…) are directly imitable in technical or professional writing. The essay also shows how to introduce specialized vocabulary by pairing Chinese term + definition in a flowing sentence.
key_devices: Hierarchical classification with consistent logical subdivisions: 以…为主 → further breakdown
Definition-via-etymology: tracing 京剧 from 皮黄戏 → 京戏 → 京剧 → 国剧
Parallel triplet listing: 唱/念/做/打; 生/旦/净/丑 — each given equal treatment
Concrete example within definition: walking posture for different roles to illustrate 做
Connecting appearance to meaning: 水袖 named for its resemblance to water ripples
Closing with scale/richness: 5000+ scripts grounds the claim of 非常丰富

model_essays.title: 梅兰芳
model_essays.text:
梅兰芳，1894年出生，1961年逝世。在50多年的舞台生活中，他精心钻研，勇于革新，创造了众多优秀的艺术形象，发展并提高了京剧旦角的演唱和表演艺术，对中国现代戏曲艺术的发展起了承前启后的作用，是享有国际盛誉的京剧艺术大师。

梅兰芳出身于京剧世家，祖父曾是一名旦角。他自己曾师从著名艺人。他8岁开始学戏，10岁登台演出。他的戏路广，基本功扎实，擅长青衣、刀马旦。对京剧旦角的唱腔、念白、舞蹈、音乐、化妆、服饰等各方面都进行了深入的研究、创造和发展，形成了自己独特的艺术流派——"梅派"。

他在《梅兰芳的舞台艺术》一书中总结了一整套舞台艺术理论，提出戏剧反映生活要在"似与不似"之间；应重神似而不重形似；演员在表演时，必须深入角色，忘掉自我，把握人物情感的发展层次。他还提出戏剧要顺从时代发展的要求，在不断创新中求得发展。

梅兰芳最擅演旦角，在长达半个世纪的舞台生活中，他塑造了众多艺术形象，如《白蛇传》中为追求爱情而同邪恶势力搏斗的白娘子；《打渔杀家》中随父英勇报仇的渔家姑娘萧桂英；《黛玉葬花》中的林黛玉；《贵妃醉酒》中的杨玉环，还有巾帼英雄穆桂英、梁红玉、虞姬等。这些个性鲜明的艺术形象体现了中国妇女各种良好的品德和温柔、含蓄、潇洒、高雅的特征。在精心塑造这些优美的艺术形象的过程中，他运用唱、念白、身段、舞蹈等技巧，把人物的心理状态刻画入微，表演自然、和谐、质朴、俏丽，极富节奏感和内在魅力，达到了炉火纯青的境界。

梅兰芳在艺术上的卓越成就引起了国外戏剧界的广泛关注和重视，并享有很高的声誉。俄国著名的戏剧理论家斯坦尼斯拉夫斯基观看了梅兰芳的京剧表演之后指出："中国京剧的表演，是一种有规律的自由动作。"既"有规律"，又能运用"自由"，这恐怕是戏剧表演中的最高境界了。德国戏剧家布莱希特也承认他的一些广泛被各国戏剧界所接受的理论是受了梅兰芳表演艺术的启示。梅兰芳先后带团多次应邀到日本、美国、前苏联等国家演出，增进了各国人民对中国古典戏剧艺术的了解，也为中外艺术史上作出了巨大的贡献。
model_essays.summary: Biographical portrait of Mei Lanfang (1894–1961), covering his origins, training, artistic achievements, theoretical contributions, the roles he created, and his international influence on world theatre.
model_essays.why_study: A model biographical essay that moves from chronological facts to thematic assessment. It shows how to build a portrait in layers: birth/training → art theory → specific roles → international reception. The phrasing for praising achievement (起了承前启后的作用, 炉火纯青的境界, 享有国际盛誉) is highly reusable in professional and academic Chinese. The technique of citing foreign authorities (Stanislavski, Brecht) to validate Chinese art is a recurring device in formal Chinese writing.
key_devices: Opening summary sentence states the thesis: life span + career achievement + historical role + title
Chronological micro-biography: 出身 → 师从 → 8岁 → 10岁 → 戏路
Aphorism quotation from his own theory: "似与不似"之间 — abstract principle made vivid
Exemplification through role list: five specific characters from famous operas cited with context
Four-element climactic list: 自然、和谐、质朴、俏丽 — registers precision
Foreign-authority endorsement: Stanislavski and Brecht used to establish global legitimacy
Chengyu as culminating judgement: 炉火纯青的境界

model_essays.title: 政府上网
model_essays.text:
当今社会，网络与人们的联系越来越密切。"个人网"、"公司网"、"政府网"等层出不穷。可以说，人们的生活已越来越离不开网络。

中华人民共和国中央人民政府门户网站，简称"中国政府网"，于2006年1月1日正式开通。它成为继"中国科技网"、"中国计算机网"、"中国教育网"、"中国信息网"之后的中国第五大网络。中国政府网是中国国务院和国务院各部门，以及各省、自治区、直辖市人民政府在国际互联网上发布政府信息和提供在线服务的综合平台。中国各级政府及其工作部门在各自的网站上以图文并茂的形式，介绍其组织结构设置、职能配置，发布有关公共事务管理的法律、法规以及政策文件，开办公共事务的成就展览。有些政府机关甚至还在网站上办公，如税务总局的网站接受单位及个人通过互联网络申报纳税，教育部授权北京市高校通过网络招生，等等。

中国政府网是政府面向社会的窗口，是公众与政府互动的渠道，对于促进政务公开、推进依法行政、接受公众监督、改进行政管理、全面履行政府职能具有重要意义。这其中最重要的有两点：

首先，它为改善政府与公民关系提供了基础。政府上网，可以使公民能够通过网络随时了解政府，了解它的组织结构和职能配置，了解有关公共事务管理的相应法律、法规和政策文件。更多的熟悉、更多的了解，意味着更多的信任，这无疑是政府争取公民信任、提高自己合法性水平的重要途径。

其次，它为公民监督各级政府遵守法律，实施法治政府、法治行政提供了充分的机会。公民要监督政府是否守法，首先需要知道政府应该遵守什么法律。过去，中国各级政府作出了很大的努力，进行广泛的法制宣传，但是，这种宣传具有临时性、局部性特点，没有长期的效应。而公民由于没有实际的需要，也没有积极性去关心。一旦需要了解特定的公共事务方面有哪些法律时，往往难以找到适当的途径。政府全方位上网，公民极其容易在网上找到有关法律依据，这样当公民认为自己的权益受到非法侵害时，就可以轻易地以法律为武器，保护自己的合法权益。

政府上网，政务公开，为政府改善与公民的关系、加强法治政府建设提供了充分的机会。然而，要使政府网充分发挥其作用，还有大量的工作要做。

首先是要转变观念。政府上网的重要目的之一是把政府的大部分有价值的信息资源放到网上，使其最大限度地得到共享，并实现政务公开，接受民主监督。这样做恐怕对许多政府机关工作人员来说，一时会难以适应，因为这是在向旧观念挑战。

第二，制度创新。政府部门工作制度化和规范化以及如何为群众提供服务性办事程序是一个很重要的问题。我们政府现在很多工作过程人治因素较重，随机性较强。为推进政府上网的顺利进行，有必要对现行的政府部门内部管理制度进行创新，加强政府部门工作的制度化、规范化、程序化。

第三，提高信息化能力。政府工作人员都应具有一定的信息化能力，即相应的信息操作能力与处理能力。由于我国信息化工程起步较晚，因此政府工作人员信息化意识弱，信息化能力普遍较低。

第四，资金、技术需加大投入。政府上网是一个复杂的、长期的系统工程。要使政府网站能长期良好地运行，必须有资金保障。另外，相关的技术问题也不容忽视。

政府上网是政府办公模式与观念上的一次革命，将为国家信息产业的健康发展创造一个良好的环境，同时对促进国家政治、经济和文化的发展会产生深远的影响。
model_essays.summary: Argues that China's e-government portal (launched 2006) improves citizen-government relations and rule of law, then identifies four challenges: changing mind-sets, institutional innovation, digital capacity, and funding/technology investment.
model_essays.why_study: A model of Chinese policy argumentation: phenomenon → significance (two key points) → problems → numbered solutions → grand conclusion. The two-part significance section (首先…其次) is a reusable template. The essay shows how to concede past efforts before showing their inadequacy (作出了很大的努力…但是…没有长期的效应). Excellent for professional and academic register: 推进依法行政, 最大限度地得到共享, 具有重要意义.
key_devices: Numerical scaffolding: 首先/其次 for arguments; 第一/第二/第三/第四 for problem list
Concession-rebuttal: 过去政府作出了很大努力…但是…没有长期的效应
Definitional anchor: 中国政府网是政府面向社会的窗口，是公众与政府互动的渠道
Legal-rights rhetoric: 以法律为武器，保护自己的合法权益
Escalating conclusion: from specific platform to 产生深远的影响 on national politics/economy/culture
Bureaucratic register vocabulary: 政务公开, 依法行政, 履行职能, 制度化/规范化/程序化

model_essays.title: 减肥的方法
model_essays.text:
肥胖，如今已成为困扰许多人的一种疾病。专家认为，肥胖症是越来越严重的流行病，如果不及早控制，它将成为全球性的重要健康问题。

怎样判断一个人是否肥胖呢？一个简易的计算方法是：标准体重（公斤）=身高（厘米）-100。通常把超过正常体重10%称为超重，超过20%就认为是肥胖。病态肥胖是指超过理想体重100%或更多。现在很多临床医生开始采用体重指数（BMI）诊断肥胖。BMI的计算方法为：BMI=体重（公斤）÷身高（米）的平方。BMI等于或低于25为正常；25-26.9为超重；27-29.9为肥胖；30-34.9为中度肥胖；35-39.9为重度肥胖；大于40为病态肥胖。

常见的治疗肥胖的方法有节食、锻炼、药物、手术。这些方法可以单独使用，也可以配合使用，但不管怎样，都必须长期坚持才会有效，才能取得最后的成功。

饮食调节主要是通过食用低脂、低热量食物，如蔬菜、豆类等，以降低体重。如果确实需要饮食治疗，应请临床医生或营养师帮助，让他们来指导制订饮食疗法方案。医疗人员首先应该了解病人是否想改变自己的饮食情况，并且对现有食谱进行评价，然后医生提出一个缓慢、循序渐进的方案，并针对每个人的具体情况制订不同的营养食谱。大多数人都知道他们应该吃哪些食物，问题是他们要么没有注意到自己正在吃哪些食物，要么是没有找到合适的食谱。从长远来看，饮食治疗可能比药物治疗更经济。但对许多肥胖患者来说，想单独通过饮食控制达到长期减肥的目的往往会失败。

许多医学专家研究发现，短期锻炼的减肥效果并不理想。中等强度的体育锻炼也并不能在短期内（几天到几周）使体重明显下降。此外，肌肉组织在脂肪组织减少的同时可能保持不变，甚至增加，这些因素都可影响减肥效果，从而使减肥者信心受到伤害。实际上，只有坚持长期的减肥运动，加上饮食控制，才能提高减肥的成功率。专家认为，运动疗法的标准是每天运动时间不少于30分钟，每周不少于4天，每次运动强度约为最大运动量的40%-60%。

由于人们已经认识到体重的增加与患病率和死亡率的上升有关，而许多人通过标准饮食和锻炼又达不到减肥目的，对这类患者就有必要进行药物减肥。但目前还没有足够的研究资料表明药物治疗对肥胖患者的效果，且长期服用减肥药的安全性问题也还在研究之中，因此使用减肥药时一定要注意。在中国有人采用中药减肥、针灸减肥和气功减肥，有一定的疗效。

目前市场上可以见到很多减肥茶、减肥药，但多数并没有确实可靠的疗效，有的还具有明显的副作用，因此在选择这类产品时最好先找专科医生咨询一下。

肥胖患者通常情况下不需要手术治疗，可采取脂吸术减肥，但脂肪组织有时会在同一位置重新聚集，或者聚集在其他地方，而且脂吸术对严重病态肥胖患者并不适用，所以在必要情况下才可以考虑手术治疗，手术治疗可以产生长期的减肥效果。目前胃减容手术的成功率在60%-70%之间，平均减肥达30%。许多患者手术后糖尿病、高血压和高血脂病症得到改善。但手术治疗有一定副作用，所以医生和患者在选择手术减肥这一方法时要仔细考虑。一般来说，不到非手术不可的程度，不要采用手术方法。
model_essays.summary: Systematic review of obesity: definition criteria (BMI scale), four treatment approaches (diet/exercise/medication/surgery), the limitations of each, and a clear hierarchy of intervention from least to most invasive.
model_essays.why_study: A model of pragmatic Chinese science writing. Shows how to present technical content accessibly: define → criteria → enumerate methods → evaluate each in turn → conclude with caveats. The structure (常见的…方法有…这些方法可以…但不管怎样…都…) is reusable for any enumeration of options. Also shows careful hedge language: 并不理想, 还没有足够的研究资料表明, 有一定的疗效 — essential for credible professional and academic writing.
key_devices: Question-as-section-opener: 怎样判断一个人是否肥胖呢？ — signals a new sub-topic
Formula presentation: BMI expressed as equation, then tiered numeric scale
Four-item enumeration as essay spine: 节食/锻炼/药物/手术 — each gets its own section
要么…要么… (either…or…) for exhaustive alternative listing of patient behaviors
只有…才… to assert the necessary condition for success
Epistemic hedges for academic tone: 并不理想, 有一定的疗效, 一定要注意
Closing caution principle: 不到非手术不可的程度，不要采用 — puts the most invasive option last

model_essays.title: 人民币
model_essays.text:
1999年10月1日，在中华人民共和国成立50周年之际，中国人民银行决定发行第五套人民币，首先发行100元券。第五套人民币共有100元、50元、20元、10元、5元、1元、5角及1角八种面额，其中100元、50元、20元、10元、5元为纸币，5角及1角为硬币，1元有纸币和硬币两种。

《中华人民共和国中国人民银行法》规定："中华人民共和国的法定货币是人民币。"

1948年12月1日，随着第一套人民币的发行，中国人民开始有了自己统一的货币。半个多世纪以来，中国的货币制度不断发展和完善。从1952年第二套人民币开始，发行了人民币硬币。从此新中国货币进入纸币、硬币同时流通的时代。1962年发行的第三套人民币是中国首次完全独立设计与印制的一套货币。1987年，为适应经济发展和人民生活的需要，中国人民银行在发行第四套人民币时调整了货币结构，增发了50元、100元大面额的人民币，进一步丰富了货币的品种。中国努力抑制通货膨胀，防止通货紧缩，保持了人民币币值的稳定，并且努力保持国际收支平衡，保持了人民币汇率的稳定。从1993年开始，人民币由禁止出入境改为限额管理。人民币在中国社会主义经济建设和人民生活中发挥了重要作用。

货币是一个国家的"名片"。它既是价值尺度、流通手段，又是反映民族文化和精神风貌的艺术品，是一个国家综合实力的体现，是一国政治、经济、文化、艺术、科技等的综合反映。发行第五套人民币就是中国社会稳定、经济发展、文化艺术繁荣、科技进步等的有力证明。

改革开放以来，中国国民经济持续、快速、健康发展。经济发展速度在世界上名列前茅，社会对现金的需求量也日益增大。经济发展的客观形势对人民币的数量与质量、总量与结构都提出了新要求。货币制度需要随着经济发展变化的实际情况进行适时调整。中国第四套人民币的设计、印制始于改革开放之初，由于当时条件的限制，第四套人民币本身存在一些不足之处，如防伪措施简单，不利于人民币的反假，缺少机读性能，不利于自动化处理等等。正是由于存在这些问题，才迫切需要发行第五套人民币。

与第四套人民币相比，第五套人民币具有鲜明的特点：首先，它是由中国人民银行首次完全独立设计与印制的货币，经专家论证，其印制技术已经达到了国际先进水平。第二，第五套人民币各种面额纸币正面均采用毛泽东同志建国初期的头像，底衬采用中国著名花卉图案，背面主景图案分别选用了人民大会堂（100元券）、布达拉宫（50元券）、桂林山水（20元券）、长江三峡（10元券）、泰山（5元券）、杭州西湖（1元券）。这些有代表性的图案充分表现了中国悠久的历史和壮丽的山河，具有鲜明的民族特色。第三，第五套人民币的主景人像、水印、面额数字都比以前大，便于识别。第四，第五套人民币应用了先进的科学技术，在防伪性能和适应货币处理现代化方面都有了较大提高。

总之，第五套人民币是一套科技含量高、具有较鲜明民族特色的货币。

第五套人民币采用一次公布，分次发行的办法。这样做，一方面继承了前四套的发行传统；另一方面也是借鉴了其他国家的成功经验，有利于货币的替换和衔接。
model_essays.summary: History and significance of the RMB from its founding in 1948 through the five series, explanation of why the fifth series was needed, and detailed account of its distinguishing features, design philosophy, and issuance strategy.
model_essays.why_study: A model of official Chinese institutional writing. Shows the historical-narrative-to-features structure used in policy documents and corporate communications: context/background → historical development → problems with current state → new solution → features of new solution → conclusion. The 货币是一个国家的"名片" metaphor is a reusable pattern for elevating any concrete object to symbolic status. 一方面…另一方面… for justification of decisions appears in boardroom and government register alike.
key_devices: Legal citation as authoritative ground: 《…法》规定…
Chronological spine: 1948/1952/1962/1987/1999 — each date triggers a development
Metaphor for elevation: 货币是一个国家的"名片"
既…又…/是…也是… to add multiple attributes to one subject
Problem-solution pivot: 正是由于存在这些问题，才迫切需要…
Numbered feature list: 首先/第二/第三/第四 with varying types of evidence per point
总之 + 一方面…另一方面… as two-part conclusion

model_essays.title: 南锣鼓巷
model_essays.genre: cultural geography essay / travel writing (文化地理散文)
model_essays.text:
南锣鼓巷位于北京什刹海右边，南北走向，长约800米，靠西各有8条胡同整齐排列着。清代南锣鼓巷曾叫罗锅巷，乾隆十五年（1750年）改称为南锣鼓巷。

现在的南锣鼓巷街区，北边是鼓楼东大街，南边是地安门东大街，西边是地安门外大街，东边是交道口南大街。由这4条街围合的这块长方形地块，是元大都的两个坊。以南锣鼓巷为界，东面是"昭回坊"，西边是"靖恭坊"，南锣鼓巷就是两坊间的分界巷。

南锣鼓巷地区是北京城内的一片居民区，与皇城只有一街之隔，已有700多年的历史。胡同、四合院、绿树，相对于红墙金瓦的主流文化，这里是砖灰瓦，呈现出另一种独特的民间色彩。

南锣鼓巷东西各有8条胡同，从南向北，西面的8条胡同是福祥胡同、裱衣胡同、雨儿胡同、帽儿胡同、景阳胡同、沙井胡同、黑芝麻胡同、前鼓楼苑胡同；东边的8条胡同是炒豆胡同、板厂胡同、东棉花胡同、北兵马司胡同、秦老胡同、前圆恩寺胡同、后圆恩寺胡同、菊儿胡同。每一条胡同都有着丰厚的文化积淀，每一所宅院里都诉说着老故事。

[Notable residences: 齐老胡同35号 was a Qing official's flower garden called绮园; 帽儿胡同35、37号 was the pre-wedding residence of the last Qing empress 婉容; 后圆恩寺胡同7号, originally a Qing prince's residence, later sold to a French buyer, features a blend of Chinese and Western architecture; 后圆恩寺胡同13号 is the former residence of the novelist 茅盾; 雨儿胡同13号 is where the master ink-wash painter 齐白石 once lived.]

如今，南锣鼓巷既是让老北京人能够回忆起往事的地方，也是年轻人休闲逛街常选之地，近几年它又成为许多时尚杂志报道的热点，许多国外游客也把它列为北京的必游景点。

这里汇聚了众多特色小店，吃、穿、玩、用全有。如充满老北京记忆的喜鹊咖啡馆；可以一边品味咖啡一边欣赏，甚至可以动手制作陶制品的玩天陶社；能吃到北京最好吃的奶酪的大宇奶酪店；女孩子进去就出不来的百分百杂货店；还有能找到与摄影相关的道具和黑白照片、各式相机的"这里"；放映上个世纪80年代经典老片的老港客电影馆……

南锣鼓巷，北京古都风貌中一块保存完整的"碧玉"，也是新北京一条有着非常特色的街巷，是至今保护最完整的四合院区。它融会了传统与现代流行时尚元素，成为越来越多国外友人和时尚人士的休闲场所，为北京又增添了一道亮丽的风景。
model_essays.summary: Introduction to Nanluo Drum Lane (南锣鼓巷) in Beijing: location/history, its 16 side alleys, notable historical residences (Empress Wanrong, Mao Dun, Qi Baishi), and its current role as a trendy destination blending old Beijing with modern boutiques.
model_essays.why_study: Excellent model of place-based writing moving from geography → history → human stories → present vitality. The technique of personifying alleys (每一所宅院里都诉说着老故事) and building emotional resonance through famous residents is directly imitable for any cultural/travel writing. The closing 碧玉 metaphor + 融会了传统与现代…成为…为北京又增添了一道亮丽的风景 is a recurring pattern in Chinese writing about revitalized historic districts.
key_devices: Orientation before description: cardinal directions + bordering streets establish spatial frame
Historical naming: tracing the name change from 罗锅巷 → 南锣鼓巷 adds depth
Contrast of materials as cultural contrast: 红墙金瓦 vs. 砖灰瓦 encodes class/identity
Anaphora: 每一条胡同…每一所宅院… — parallel structure builds rhythm
Personification: 宅院里都诉说着老故事
Three-audience enumeration: 老北京人/年轻人/国外游客 — shows broad appeal
Closing metaphor + synthesis: 碧玉 image + 融会了传统与现代

grammar_patterns.explanation: Indicates the primary component or focus. Used to say something mainly consists of X, or centers on X. Very common in formal exposition and technical description.
examples: 京剧的唱腔以"西皮"和"二黄"为主。（The vocal styles of Peking Opera center primarily on xīpí and èrhuáng.）
食品消费结构由主食型向副食型转变。（Dietary consumption structure shifted from staple-food-centered to side-dish-centered.）
整个景区以世界罕见的石英砂岩峰林峡谷地貌为主体。（The scenic area is defined primarily by its world-rare quartzite peak-forest canyon landform.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Not only… but also. A fundamental parallel intensifier. In formal writing it often appears at clause or sentence level, adding a stronger or more important point to a first point.
examples: 黄山不仅风光奇秀，而且还出产名贵动植物。（Huangshan not only has extraordinary scenery, it also produces rare and precious flora and fauna.）
整座府邸不仅宽大，而且建筑规制也相当高。（The entire mansion is not only spacious but also built to a very high architectural standard.）
肥胖不仅仅影响外观，更是一个危害健康的杀手。（Obesity does not merely affect appearance; it is a more fundamental threat to health.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: As X increases/changes, Y also (increasingly) changes. Expresses co-variation or proportional change. Very common in economic, social, and scientific discourse.
examples: 随着生活费和食品费的增加，北京居民食品支出所占比重在逐年降低。（As living expenses and food costs rise, Beijing residents' food expenditure as a share of total spending falls year by year.）
随着都市生活节奏的加快，饮食社会化程度也越来越高。（As urban life speeds up, the degree to which eating is outsourced to social settings increases.）
随着经济社会的不断发展，城镇居民家庭收入水平大幅度提高。（As economic and social development continues, urban household income levels have risen sharply.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Only if / only when X, then Y. Expresses necessary condition. Used to argue that a single approach is indispensable for achieving a result.
examples: 只有坚持长期的减肥运动，加上饮食控制，才能提高减肥的成功率。（Only by maintaining long-term exercise combined with dietary control can the weight-loss success rate be improved.）
只要把政府的信息资源放到网上，才能使其最大限度地得到共享。（Only by putting government information resources online can they be shared to the fullest extent.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Due to X, therefore Y / it is because of X that Y. Causal connector heavily used in policy, science, and economic writing. 由于 can open the sentence or clause; 才 adds emphasis that Y is a direct and exclusive consequence.
examples: 由于山上地势不平，悬崖峭壁纵横交错，黄山松无法垂直生长。（Because the mountain terrain is uneven and cliffs crisscross, Huangshan pines cannot grow vertically.）
由于我国信息化工程起步较晚，因此政府工作人员信息化能力普遍较低。（Because China's information technology programs started relatively late, government staff have generally low digital capability.）
正是由于存在这些问题，才迫切需要发行第五套人民币。（It is precisely because of these problems that the fifth series of the RMB was urgently needed.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: On one hand…on the other hand. Used to present a two-pronged justification, explanation, or contrast. Very common in policy documents, reports, and analytical essays.
examples: 这样做，一方面继承了前四套的发行传统；另一方面也是借鉴了其他国家的成功经验。（Doing it this way, on one hand, upholds the issuance tradition of the previous four series; on the other hand, it draws on the successful experience of other countries.）
短期锻炼一方面效果有限，另一方面肌肉组织可能增加，从而影响减肥效果。（Short-term exercise, on one hand, has limited effect; on the other, muscle mass may increase, affecting the weight-loss result.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: No matter / regardless of X, always Y. Used to assert that a rule or principle applies universally, without exception. Common in explaining cultural norms or universal conditions.
examples: 不管是哪个朝代的人物，基本上都是明朝的打扮。（Regardless of which dynasty a character belongs to, costumes are basically in Ming Dynasty style.）
不管怎样，都必须长期坚持才会有效。（No matter which method is used, long-term persistence is required for it to be effective.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Both X and Y / is at once X and Y. Enumerates two co-existing qualities or functions. Adds elegance compared with 也…也… by suggesting more intrinsic coherence between the two attributes.
examples: 货币既是价值尺度、流通手段，又是反映民族文化和精神风貌的艺术品。（Currency is both a measure of value and a medium of exchange, and an artwork reflecting national culture and spirit.）
南锣鼓巷既是让老北京人能够回忆起往事的地方，也是年轻人休闲逛街常选之地。（Nanluo Drum Lane is at once a place for old Beijingers to recall the past and a favorite hangout for young people.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: According to X, data show / evidence indicates. Introduces cited evidence in a neutral, authoritative register. Essential in economic, policy, and scientific writing.
examples: 据中国有关部门统计，中国成人识字率已达90%以上。（According to Chinese government statistics, the adult literacy rate has exceeded 90%.）
据国家统计局的一项调查显示，只有38.6%的消费者相信防伪标志。（A survey by the National Bureau of Statistics shows that only 38.6% of consumers trust anti-counterfeiting labels.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Cannot do X, can only do Y. Expresses forced adaptation or constraint. Shows how a subject responds to an obstacle by taking an alternative path. Useful for describing resilience or limitation in analytical writing.
examples: 黄山松无法垂直生长，只能弯弯曲曲地甚至向下生长，显示出顽强的生命力。（Huangshan pines cannot grow vertically; they can only grow in twists and turns or even downward, displaying indomitable vitality.）
政府上网，公民极其容易找到有关法律依据，以法律为武器，保护自己的合法权益。

grammar_patterns.explanation: Firstly…secondly…thirdly. Numerical scaffolding for organizing multi-point arguments. In Chinese formal writing, these markers carry structural weight and signal the writer's control of the material.
examples: 首先，它为改善政府与公民关系提供了基础。其次，它为公民监督各级政府遵守法律…提供了充分的机会。（First, it provides a foundation for improving government-citizen relations. Second, it provides citizens with full opportunity to supervise government compliance with law.）
与第四套人民币相比，第五套人民币具有鲜明的特点：首先…第二…第三…第四…（Compared with the fourth series, the fifth series RMB has distinctive features: first…second…third…fourth…）

grammar_patterns.explanation: From the perspective of X / as regards X. Frames the discussion within a specific angle of analysis. Used heavily in academic, statistical, and policy discourse.
examples: 从方位分布上看，全山有东海、南海、西海、北海和天海。（From the perspective of spatial distribution, the mountain has five cloud seas: East, South, West, North, and Sky.）
就目前情况来看，动物性食品和细加工食品仍偏低。（As regards the current situation, animal-based foods and finely processed foods are still insufficient.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: This is undoubtedly / unquestionably… Used to assert a conclusion with confidence after presenting supporting reasoning. More emphatic than 这是. Common in argumentative and analytical writing.
examples: 这无疑是政府争取公民信任、提高自己合法性水平的重要途径。（This is undoubtedly an important avenue for the government to win citizen trust and enhance its own legitimacy.）

grammar_patterns.explanation: Cannot be ignored / must not be overlooked. A formulaic expression in policy and analytical Chinese, usually placed at the end of a clause about a risk, problem, or consideration.
examples: 相关的技术问题也不容忽视。（Related technical issues must not be overlooked.）
长期服用减肥药的安全性问题也还在研究之中，因此使用减肥药时一定要注意。（The safety of long-term use of weight-loss drugs is still under investigation and must not be ignored.）

expressions.meaning: To rank among the top; to be at the head of the list. Originally refers to military banner-bearers at the front of a column.
expressions.register: formal, written; used in economics, sports rankings, academic standing

expressions.meaning: To rank first; to be foremost. Stronger than 第一; conveys that no one else comes close.
expressions.register: formal, emphatic; used in appraisals and superlatives

expressions.meaning: To serve as a bridge between past and future; to carry on the past and open the way for the future.
expressions.register: formal, literary; used in historical and biographical assessments

expressions.meaning: Literally: the furnace flame has turned pure blue — i.e., to have reached a state of perfection or consummate mastery in one's art or craft.
expressions.register: literary, high register; used to appraise artistic or technical achievement

expressions.meaning: In a thousand postures and a hundred forms; endlessly varied in shape, appearance, or expression.
expressions.register: descriptive, literary; used in nature writing and art criticism

expressions.meaning: To emerge in an endless stream; to keep appearing one after another without end.
expressions.register: formal, neutral; used in analytical writing to describe rapid proliferation of phenomena

expressions.meaning: Both illustrations and writing are excellent; rich in both text and images.
expressions.register: formal, commonly used in publishing, media, and editorial contexts

expressions.meaning: To linger and forget to leave; so engrossed in enjoyment that one loses track of time and cannot bear to go.
expressions.register: literary, positive; used in travel and appreciation contexts

expressions.meaning: To praise without stopping; to be full of unstinting praise.
expressions.register: colloquial-to-formal; used in reviews and descriptions of strong positive reactions

expressions.meaning: To come drawn by someone's/something's reputation; attracted by fame.
expressions.register: formal-literary; used in tourism, brand, and reputation contexts

expressions.meaning: To spare no effort; to give one's all without holding anything back.
expressions.register: formal; used in business, policy, and strategic contexts

expressions.meaning: To grow with each passing day; to increase day by day.
expressions.register: formal, written; used in economic, demographic, and social analysis

expressions.meaning: Increasingly; more and more day by day. Adverb modifying a verb/adjective.
expressions.register: formal; standard written Chinese; very common in reports and journalism

expressions.meaning: Year by year; annually over time. Adverb indicating gradual change across years.
expressions.register: formal; statistics, economics, policy

expressions.meaning: Day by day (trending toward). Indicates a gradual directional change; more literary than 日益.
expressions.register: formal, written; often used before 合理, 完善, 复杂 etc.

expressions.meaning: Cannot be ignored; must not be overlooked.
expressions.register: formal, policy and analytical writing; signals a warning or important caveat

expressions.meaning: Proven effective in practice; effective when implemented.
expressions.register: formal, policy/business; used to endorse practical measures

expressions.meaning: To play a role; to give full play to one's function. Very common verbal phrase.
expressions.register: formal, general; appears in policy, education, and institutional writing

expressions.meaning: Comprehensive strength; overall national/organizational power.
expressions.register: formal, political/economic; used to discuss nations, companies, institutions

expressions.meaning: To have distinctive characteristics; to be clearly distinctive.
expressions.register: formal; used in product descriptions, cultural analysis, policy summaries

expressions.meaning: To integrate X and Y into a unified whole. X and Y are inserted between 融 and 为一体.
expressions.register: formal, literary; used in cultural, architectural, and business contexts

expressions.meaning: To proceed step by step in an orderly way; to advance gradually and steadily.
expressions.register: formal, educational/medical; used in learning, therapy, and process design

expressions.meaning: Unpredictable and ever-changing; impossible to fathom.
expressions.register: literary; used for weather, markets, political situations

expressions.meaning: Vivid and lifelike; so realistic as to seem alive.
expressions.register: literary; used in art criticism, descriptions of performances and statues

expressions.meaning: Quite; rather; considerably. Adverb intensifying an adjective.
expressions.register: semi-formal, literary; more elegant than 很 or 比较

expressions.meaning: Engel's coefficient: food expenditure as a percentage of total household spending, used to measure living standards.
expressions.register: technical, economics; essential in economic/social analysis

expressions.meaning: Per capita disposable income.
expressions.register: technical, economic statistics; indispensable in Chinese economic writing

expressions.zh: 通货膨胀 / 通货紧缩
expressions.meaning: Inflation / deflation.
expressions.register: technical, economics and finance

expressions.meaning: Anti-counterfeiting mark / security feature.
expressions.register: technical, commerce and consumer protection

expressions.meaning: Government affairs transparency; making government operations open to the public.
expressions.register: political/administrative; standard term in governance discourse

expressions.meaning: To administer according to law; rule-of-law governance.
expressions.register: political/legal, formal; key phrase in Chinese administrative language

expressions.meaning: Indomitable/tenacious vitality; relentless life force.
expressions.register: literary; used to describe organisms, movements, and resilient things

expressions.meaning: To portray with meticulous detail; to delineate so precisely as to capture the finest nuances.
expressions.register: literary; used to praise artistic performance, writing, or painting

expressions.meaning: Once; as soon as; in the event that. Introduces a conditional or hypothetical scenario.
expressions.register: formal, written; common in legal, policy, and analytical writing

expressions.meaning: To use X as a weapon. Metaphor pattern that can be extended to any tool used defensively or offensively in non-military context.
expressions.register: formal, rhetorical; used in legal, labor rights, advocacy writing

expressions.zh: 针对每个人的具体情况
expressions.pinyin: zhēnduì měi gèrén de jùtǐ qíngkuàng
expressions.meaning: Targeted to each individual's specific circumstances; personalized.
expressions.register: formal; standard phrase in medical, educational, and HR writing

expressions.zh: 在…方面都有了较大提高
expressions.pinyin: zài … fāngmiàn dōu yǒule jiào dà tígāo
expressions.meaning: Have seen significant improvement in the area of…
expressions.register: formal, reports; boilerplate for summarizing progress

expressions.meaning: In short; in summary; to sum up. Standard formal essay conclusion signal.
expressions.register: formal, universal; used in any register to introduce a summary or conclusion

expressions.meaning: To produce a far-reaching impact; to have profound and lasting effects.
expressions.register: formal; used in historical, policy, and strategic assessments

expressions.zh: 增添了一道亮丽的风景
expressions.pinyin: zēngtiān le yī dào liànglì de fēngjǐng
expressions.meaning: To add a bright and beautiful sight/element; to enrich the landscape — often used figuratively.
expressions.register: semi-literary; used in urban planning, tourism, and cultural writing

essay_takeaways: Open with scope, then drill down. Chinese expository essays consistently move from the general (location, total area, international fame) to the specific (individual peaks, species counts, exact temperatures). Avoid jumping straight into detail without orienting the reader first.

Use a named organizing framework. The best texts anchor their structure in a named set: 四绝 (four wonders), 四功 (four skills), 生旦净丑 (four role types). This technique signals analytical control and makes the essay memorable. When writing about any complex domain, find or create a named framework.

Statistical specificity elevates descriptive prose. Numbers (海拔1864米, 70度, 300多种脊椎动物) anchor impressionistic language and establish authority. Mix data with sensory description — this combination is more persuasive than either alone.

Classical citations and sayings serve as the highest register of endorsement. Quoting a classical couplet (五岳归来不看山，黄山归来不看岳) or a UNESCO official signals that the claim is beyond personal opinion. Build a repertoire of quotable sayings for topics you write about frequently.

The concession-rebuttal pattern is essential for argumentative essays. Chinese policy writing does not ignore counterevidence; it acknowledges past efforts, identifies their specific inadequacies (临时性、局部性特点，没有长期的效应), and then presents the new solution as a direct answer. This pattern (过去…努力…但是…没有…效应) is more credible than ignoring objections.

Numbered first/second/third scaffolding (首先…其次…/第一…第二…) is the default organizational device in Chinese analytical writing. Use it for arguments, problems, and solutions. It signals a logical mind and makes your writing easy to follow in professional contexts.

Metaphors in formal Chinese writing are usually brief and grounded in concrete objects. 货币是一个国家的'名片' (currency is a country's business card) works because it unpacks into multiple attributes (identity, compact, representative). Strong Chinese metaphors are reversible: the tenor and vehicle each illuminate the other.
要么…要么… and 一方面…另一方面… are the two standard binary framing devices. Use 要么…要么… for exhaustive alternatives (the reader either does A or does B); use 一方面…另一方面… for justifications or co-existing factors.

Hedge with specific phrases, not vague qualifiers. Formal Chinese academic and medical writing uses 并不理想, 有一定的疗效, 还没有足够的研究资料表明 rather than vague adverbs. Specific hedges signal scientific honesty; vague hedges signal evasion.

Closing sentences in Chinese essays often zoom out to maximum significance. After all the specific details, the conclusion asserts the broadest impact: 对促进国家政治、经济和文化的发展会产生深远的影响. Train yourself to write a 'significance escalator' from the specific claim to the largest relevant domain.

The pattern '不到非X不可的程度，不要采用X方法' (do not resort to X unless absolutely necessary) is a reusable template for any graduated advice — medical, legal, business. It shows the writer has a sense of proportionality.

Place writing follows a reliable sequence: location → historical name/origin → boundaries/layout → notable sub-elements → famous associated people → present-day significance. This sequence works for describing a district, a building, or an institution.
